title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are out of date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is up to date
scenario: Language change in Device Settings does not persist on smart charge case when earbuds are on outdated firmware and case firmware is already up to date
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) to open Device Settings.
3. Verify the earbuds/headset are on an outdated firmware version (e.g., check under Device Settings → Firmware Update).
4. Verify the smart charge case/stand is already up to date (e.g., check under Device Settings → Firmware Update for case/stand status).
5. Navigate to Device Settings → Language and change the language to a different supported language.
6. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) for the earbuds/headset from Device Settings → Firmware Update.
7. Wait for the firmware update to complete for all components (earbuds/headset and case/stand).
8. After the update completes, check the language setting on the smart charge case (e.g., listen for voice prompts or check the case display if applicable).
expected: The firmware update (DFU) completes successfully for all components (earbuds/headset and case/stand). The language change applied to the smart charge case (e.g., Voyager Free 60+) is correctly reflected (e.g., voice prompts or case display show the new language).
